schedule.description: Every day at 8:15 AM Pacific Time

prompt: Devon, index the current state of the Home Center project, validate and report Codex harness status, check David's latest design outputs for build-worthy ideas, review current repo status/tests/docs/TODOs, and suggest the next 3-5 development steps. Do not make code changes. Return a concise PM-style morning brief with Codex harness status, David design review, risks, blockers, and the single best next action.
